title: Lock UART baud and framing before data debug
description: Set baud, parity, and stop bits identically on both ends and confirm framing on a scope before chasing payload bugs.
body: Use when UART characters arrive garbled or intermittently. Do not raise the baud rate to chase throughput before the link is clean at a low rate. Actions: verify both ends share baud, data bits, parity, and stop bits, then measure the bit period on a capture against the configured rate. Validation signals include a known test string received intact and a framing-error counter that stays at zero. Risk boundary: a clock source that drifts under temperature can break a marginal link in the field, so escalate to a crystal or auto-baud when error rates climb.
